signals.description: Affiliated investment bank Class VI Partners represented Helimix in its acquisition by YETI, part of a 2025-2026 exit/M&A pipeline that channels newly-liquid business owners into the family office.
Class VI Partners advised Electric Equipment & Engineering on its recapitalization by HKW Inc., one of several 2025 liquidity events from the affiliated deal practice.
Launched as a newly SEC-registered RIA (Georgia entity formed 2025-08-20) under CEO Michael Callahan, serving families below single-family-office scale (~$189M AUM).
Merged with Denver-based IWP Family Office to form a ~$10B+ AUA multi-family office of 90+ professionals across St. Louis, Denver, and Dallas-Fort Worth, ~140 UHNW families.
BW Forsyth Partners provided strategic evergreen capital backing the merger and future acquisitions; Katherine Lintz managing partner, IWP's Charlie Willhoit CEO.
